files.notes: This file contains two distinct lesson sections from the Guide Lessons for November: Lesson III on Literature (Nathaniel Hawthorne's Writings) and Lesson IV on Social Service (Problems of Behavior). The file also includes a Teachers' Topic section and a poem at the end. The lessons are clearly separated by their Roman numeral headings and distinct subject matter.
